text_full: LO. INDUSTRIAL ENGINEERING SOFTWARE ENGINEER Expo Industrial engineering is under Expo Industrial Group, which was established under the purview of the BOI since 1992, for the purpose of providing engineering requirements, spares, machinery tools, component, injection molded products, high precision solutions to different industries and developing, designing, manufacturing of heat transfer and screen-pri top tier garment industry and life style industry with leading brands in the US, UK and Europe. Applications are called from suitable candidate to fill the following vacancies at our manufacturing facility at Phase 11, EPZ.Katunayake We are seel 1g a Senior Software Engineer with strong expertise in application development, database reporting, quality assurance, and production deployments. The ideal candidate will play a key role in development, testing, release management, and report development, ensuring reliable, high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, test, and maintain software applications using C#.NET, PHP, JavaScript, and jQuery Develop and optimize SAL queries, views, stored procedures, and database schemas Design, develop, and maintain business and operational reports using SQL and Crystal Reports Perform quality assurance (QA) activities including unit testing, system testing, regression testing, and bug fixing Manage version control, release builds, and deployment cycles Deploy, configure, and maintain applications on Ils (for .NET) and Apache (for PHP) Coordinate version releases, patches, and hotfix deployments across environments (Dev / UAT / Production) Troubleshoot production issues and provide timely fixes and root-cause analysis Work closely with business users to understand reporting and system requirements Ensure compliance with coding standards, security best practices, and documentation Required Skills & Qualifications ‘Strong proficiency in SQL (complex queries, stored procedures, performance tuning) Proven experience developing reports using Crystal Reports ‘Strong experience in C#.NET (ASP.NET / .NET Framework / .NET Core) Solid hands-on experience with PHP Strong front-end development skills using JavaScript and jQuery ‘ Experience with Il configuration and deployment Experience with Apache web server configuration for PHP applications Hands-on experience in QA processes and testing methodologies Experience with version control systems (Git / SVN or similar) Good understanding of software release management Experience with ERP, MIS, or eporting-intensive enterprise systems , knowledge of RESTful APIs and third-party system integrations, familiarity with Version Control Systems TFS, GIT and experience working in Agile / Scrum environments will be added advantage The remuneration package for the above position is negotiable and would be in line with the applicant's experience and qualifications. If you think you have what it takes to be successful in this challenging role, please apply within 7 days of this publication by email to dulaksha.n@expo.|k or by post to Manager — HR and istration, Expo Industrial Engineering Pvt .{TD, Phase 11, EPZ, Katunayake indicating the position applied for on the subject line of the email or on the top left corner of the envelope. The Company reserves the right to communicate with the short listed applicants only. Expo Industrial Engineering Pvt.LTD is an equal Opportunity Employer.

It is committed to provide the best student experience through a dedi academic and non and recreat sted group of ademic staff. The main campus located in Malabe has excellent academic nal facilities. We are looking for a dynamic and result oriented i Software Engineer attached to Department of IT. dual to join our team as Associate Key Duties & Responsibilities : * Analyzing requirements and designing, developing, and deploying new software applications. Identifying opportunities for improving existing applications, making recommendations, and designing and implementing enhancements. Integrating existing software products with new solutions to ensure the required outcomes. Maintaining and improving existing codebases and conducting peer reviews of code changes. Testing software applications to ensure quality and reliability. Minimum Requirements: * A Bachelor's degree in a relevant field from a recognized University/ Institution. A minimum of 1 to 2 years of proven experience in software development. Strong knowledge on .NET technologies, relational databases such as MS SQL , MySQL, and web services and APIs: REST, JSON + Knowledge of Entity Framework and LINQ, JavaScript Experience in fullstack development and working in an Agile environment. text_full: Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49th year of business operations. While partnering the world’s leading IT Co’s, DMS specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, Financial solutions and learning from experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry. DMS represents the World’s leading American IT Co’s IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust-Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years. The following vacancy currently exists in the Banking and Financial Systems Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of DMS. Vacancy: Software Engineer (Male) Applicants should be under 28 years of age and possess a Computer Science / Software degree from a recognized University / Institute and have a desire to pursue a career in Software Development and Support. Candidates for these positions should have: Working knowledge in C#, .NET Framework, Web Forms, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3 and PostgreSQL. A willingness to learn new things, and have the ability to Understand Programming Logic. Strong ability to reverse engineer code and the ability to read and understand code written by others. A good grasp of OOP design concepts and functional programming concepts. Ability to suggest innovative ideas and find solutions to problems on their own. Have the ability to interpret new SDK references and documentation. Experience in using Linux and Microsoft Windows servers, drivers, their functions etc. If selected for an interview, applicants should be able to Demonstrate All Above Listed Capabilities with Examples from academic & internship or work related projects completed. Job Profile Includes the following: - Customer requirement gathering. Planning, Design and Implementation of software applications, including UI design and writing code according to given specifications. Working as part of a team, which may be established for a specific project. Preparing documentation for developed programs. Testing sample data-sets to check that the program works as intended. Other general IT related tasks. Benefits: Attractive remuneration packages based on qualifications and experience. Comprehensive medical insurance upon confirmation. How to Apply: Email your CV along with the names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com . Please specify the position you are applying for in the subject line of the email. Applicants should be under 28 years of age and possess a Computer Science / Software degree from a recognized University / Institute and have a desire to pursue a career in Software Development and Support. ‘Candidates for these positions should have: * Working knowledge in C#, NET Framework, Web Forms, JavaScript, HTMLS, CSS and PostgreSQL. * Awillingness to learn new things, and have the ability to Understand Programming Logic. * Strong ability to reverse engineer code and the ability to read and understand code written by others. * A good grasp of OOP design concepts and functional programming concepts. * Ability to suggest innovative ideas and find solutions to problems on their own. © Have the ability to interpret new SDK references and documentation. © Experience in using Linux and Microsoft Windows servers, drivers, their functions etc. If selected for an interview, applicants should be able to Demonstrate All Above Listed Capal Job Profile Includes the following: - © Customer requirement gathering. * Planning, Design and Implementation of software applications, including UI design and writing code according to given specifications. * Working as part of a team, which may be established for a specific project. + Preparing documentation for developed programs. * Testing sample data-sets to check that the program works as intended. * Other general IT related tasks. Benefits: + attractive remuneration packages based on qualifications and experience. * Comprehensive medical insurance upon confirmation. How to Apply: Email your CV along with the names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com. Please specify the position you are applying for in the subject line of the email.

text_full: JOIN. TEAM OF SPSl Browns Browns is one of the largest diversified conglomerates in Sri Lanka, which manages a fast growing and valuable portfolio of brands across several key industry sectors, such as automotive; plantations; leisure; power generation; agriculture; pharmaceuticals; oie * investments; marine and manufacturing. Being in existence for over 150 years, the Company is built upon a strong foundation of strength, driven by a vision and a will to succeed. We are looking for a self-motivated, result-driven individual with a proven track record to join our Browns Group. Full Stack Software Engineer Key Responsibilities ¢ Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend systems and microservices using Golang ¢ Build and optimize RESTful APIs and real-time services using WebSockets ¢ Implement robust authentication, authorization, and data security practices ¢ Ensure high availability, performance, fault tolerance, and reliability of systems ¢ Write clean, well-documented, and testable code following industry best practices ¢ Work with databases including MySQL, MSSQL, and MongoDB, covering schema design, query optimization, and performance tuning ¢« Manage data consistency, concurrency, and transaction handling ¢ Collaborate with frontend teams on React-based integrations and contribute to frontend development when required Work closely with DevOps teams on CI/CD pipelines, containerization, and deployments (Docker experience is an advantage) Utilize message queues such as Kafka or RabbitMQ@ Participate in system architecture design, technical discussions, and decision-making Support system monitoring and logging using tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, or ELK Qualifications & Experience Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience Minimum of two (2) years’ experience in a similar role Experience working on large-scale or high-traffic systems Prior experience mentoring or leading development teams will be an advantage Strong analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills Sound understanding of scalable system design and software design patterns Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments Excellent communication and teamwork skills Ability to work independently and take ownership of assigned responsibilities If you believe your profile matches the role, kindly please forward your CV to us within 7 days of this advertisement. Human Resources Department Brown & Company PLC <3 34, Sir Mohamed Macan Markar Mawatha, Colombo - 03 wns Tel: O112 663 O00 Bro = AHeritage of Trust E-mail: careers@brownsgroup.com Apply now! www.brownsgroup.com | © fin)

text_full: Ww teejay Teejay Lanka PLC is Sri Lanka’s first multinational textile manufacturer, with operations in Sri Lanka, India, and a growing presence in Indonesia and Egypt. Since 2000, Teejay has been one of South Asia’s largest knit fabric producers and a trusted supplier to leading global fashion and apparel brands. Listed on the Colombo Stock Exchange, the company is recognized for sustainability, innovation, and manufacturing excellence, offering advanced weft-knit fabrics and eco-friendly textile solutions that strengthen its role in the global fashion supply chain. SOFTWARE ENGINEER — FULL STACK Location — Teejay Lanka PLC - Avissawella The Job e Analyze, Design, develop, and maintain software solutions to improve efficiency and reduce manual processes. e Collaborate with Business Analysts and subject matter experts to understand requirements and deliver practical solutions. e Configure, optimize, and automate business processes for scalability and performance. e Conduct testing, debugging, and troubleshooting to ensure high-quality, reliable applications. e Provide technical expertise and support to team members and business users. e Ensure timely delivery of projects while maintaining quality and compliance standards. e Stay updated with the latest advancements in Microsoft, mobile, and automation technologies. e Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver IT services on time. position: Mid-Level Software Engineer (React) - POS & Retail Systems
text_excerpt: Hiring? Cloud POS The Job * Build and maintain a POS system using React (TypeScript preferred). * Implement core workflows: cart, discounts, taxes, payments, refunds, and receipts. * Integrate REST/GraphQL APIs with proper loading and error handling. * Support offline usage with caching, local storage, and sync strategies. © Optimize performance and UX for high-throughput transactions. * Develop reusable Ul components aligned with the POS design system. * Participate in code reviews, reduce technical debt, and improve code quality. * Debug production issues and support stable releases. The Person * 2-4years of experience building production React applications. *- Strong skills in JavaScript/...
text_full: Hiring? Cloud POS The Job * Build and maintain a POS system using React (TypeScript preferred). * Implement core workflows: cart, discounts, taxes, payments, refunds, and receipts. * Integrate REST/GraphQL APIs with proper loading and error handling. * Support offline usage with caching, local storage, and sync strategies. © Optimize performance and UX for high-throughput transactions. * Develop reusable Ul components aligned with the POS design system. * Participate in code reviews, reduce technical debt, and improve code quality. * Debug production issues and support stable releases. The Person * 2-4years of experience building production React applications. *- Strong skills in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML and Tailwind Css. * Experience with state management and asyne data handling (Redux, Zustand, Context, React Query, etc.). * Comfortable building complex forms, tables, and data-heavy UIs. * Strong engineering practices: clean code, component architecture, Git, and code reviews. * Ability to work independently and collaborate effectively with product, design, and backend teams. Nice To Have * Experience with payment systems, including gateways, payment intents, retries, and webhooks. Familiarity with POS hardware integrations such as receipt printers, barcode scanners, and cash drawers. * Knowledge of RBAC, multi-merchant or multi-outlet systems, and audit logging. * Testing experience with Jest, React Testing Library, and Cypress or Playwright, especially for critical checkout flows. * Understanding of security and compliance basics, including safe handling of sensitive data and PCI concepts.

text_full: SriLankan Airlines Business Systems Analyst Vacancy Description SriLankan Airlines Ltd, the national carrier of Sri Lanka operates with a network of destinations throughout Asia, the Middle East, Europe and Australia. The airlines has a strong presence in Maldives and Southern India. SriLankan is a member of the oneworld alliance. Europe, and Australia. The Airline has a strong presence in the Maldives and Southern India. SriLankan is a member of the ‘oneworld’ alliance. SriLankan IT Systems drives the airline’s IT strategy through digital transformation, technology adoption, data modeling, business intelligence, and business continuity. The focus is on transforming business and operational processes, expanding digital passenger reach, and improving customer experience through solutions design, development, and integrations while enhancing airline IT domain knowledge. Award-winning SriLankan IT team is seeking a dynamic individual to join as a Business Systems Analyst. The individual is responsible for Providing analytical solutions to improve efficiency and productivity through the processes and features of Commercial and Finance Systems. Analyze the situations, prioritize and deliver the solutions and resolve issues using the external and internal resources assigned to the unit meeting agreed service levels. Key responsibilities will include: Identify and document business objectives, functional requirements, data models, technical architecture and dependencies with other IT systems. Assist the business managers in formulating a plan for acquiring packaged solutions or in sponsoring custom-made software development. Participate in the preparation and execution of project implementation plans, Test plans and assist the project manager to meet the project targets. Review the issues reported by the business users, analyze the issue, come up with prospective solutions and assist the supervisor to select the appropriate solution. Work with the team to deliver the agreed solution. Work with Oracle Inc to get the support requests resolved. Effective adherence of CIS&PM (Corporate Information Security & Privacy Management Manual) by implementing and advocating security controls to safeguard information security of Information Assets. Review the processes in the respective business areas, document them, and work to improve efficiency and effectiveness to achieve cost savings, revenue gains, or other benefits to the company. Review the Oracle EBS implementation and other Commercial and Finance system implementations on a timely basis, recommend improvements, and work with the team to implement approved suggestions. Set deliverables and targets for staff, closely supervise and follow up on their work, track progress, and regularly report on resource requirements. Requirements Bachelors’ Degree*in relevant field from a recognized University with a minimum of 01 years post qualifying Relevant Experience (*Engineering, Computer Science, General Science with Mathematics, Management Information Systems, Applied Statistics etc.) OR ​ Full professional qualification equivalent to NVQ Level 07 with 03 years post qualifying experience in a relevant discipline. Be a Sri Lankan citizen. The upper age limit should be 35 years as of 20th February 2026, which is the closing date. Employment will be offered on fixed term contract. We are an equal opportunity organization. Influencing will be a reflection of unsuitability. Please note that we will correspond with you within a month of closing the advertisement in the event your application is shortlisted for consideration. The focus is on transforming business and operational processes, expanding digital passenger reach, and improving customer| lexperience through solutions design, development, and integrations while enhancing airline IT domain knowledge. Award-winning SriLankan IT team| is seeking a dynamic individual to join as a Business Systems Analyst. The idual is responsible for Providing analytical solutions to improve efficiency and productivity through the processes and features of| Commercial and Finance Systems. Analyze the situations, prioritize and deliver the solutions and resolve issues using the external and internal] resources assigned to the unit meeting agreed service levels. clude: * Identify and document business objectives, functional requirements, data models, technical architecture and dependencies with other IT| systems. Work with the team to deliver the agreed solution. Work with Oracle Inc to get the support requests resolved. * Effective adherence of CIS&PM (Corporate Information Security & Privacy Management Manual) by implementing and advocating security| controls to safeguard information security of Information Assets. * Review the processes in the respective business areas, document them, and work to improve efficiency and effectiveness to act savings, revenue gains, or other benefits to the company. * Review the Oracle EBS implementation and other Commercial and Finance system implementations on a timely basis, recommend| provements, and work with the team to implement approved suggestions. * Set deliverables and targets for staff, closely supervise and follow up on their work, track progress, and regularly report on resource| requirements. 2 cost} Requirements Bachelors’ Degree*in relevant field from a recognized University with a minimum of 01 years post qualifying Relevant Experience (*Engineering,] Computer Science, General Science with Mathematics, Management Information Systems, Applied Statistics etc.)

text_full: Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 48 th year of operations. DMS represents the world’s leading IT brands and specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets. DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, financial solutions and learning from the most experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry. DMS represents Diebold Nixdorf Inc. USA, the world leader in CRMs (Cash Recycling Machines) and ATMs (Automated Teller Machines) and while having implemented the following pioneering Projects, DMS is the market leader supporting an installed base of over 2000 CRMs and ATMs in Sri Lanka and the Maldives. Introduced ATMs to the Maldives in 1999 First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific. First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific. First Envelope-less Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific. First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins. Career advancement is based on performance and merit. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Kuliyapitiya to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Kuliyapitiya should apply. Engineering Service Executives for Kuliyapitiya (Male) Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training. Candidates should: - Be under 27 years of age. Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution. Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software. Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Kuliyapitiya area. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply. Candidates should reside in the Kuliyapitiya Town or in close proximity to the Kuliyapitiya Town and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license. Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond. GENERAL • The above position includes a negotiable salary. Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com . Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail. * First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives © First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific. © First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific. © First Envelope-tess Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific. © First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins. Career advancement is based on performance and merit. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Kuliyapitiya to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Kuliyapitiya should apply. Engineering Service Executives for Kuliyapitiya (Male) Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training. Candidates should: - 1. Be under 27 years of age. 2. Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution. 3. Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software. Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Kuliyapitiya area. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply. Candidates should reside in the Kuliyapitiya Town or in close proximity to the Kuliyapitiya Town and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license. ‘Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond. GENERAL + The above position includes a negotiable salary. Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to careers(@dmslanka?.com, Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail.

DMS specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets DMS provides the excitement of working with the world's leading IT brands, Financial solutions and learning from experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry. DMS represents the World's leading American IT Co's IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust-Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years. The following vacancies currently exist in the Banking and Financial Systems Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of DMS. Vacancy: Electronics Engineer s Applicants should be under 28 years of age and have a degree or a Higher National Diploma in Electronics Engineering. Selected candidates will have to test, troubleshoot, and carry out repairs for defective Electronic and other devices and identify long-term rectifications for frequent defects. Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a defined career growth path to Management. Candidates living in the Greater Colombo area are preferred. Benefits: Attractive remuneration package based on qualifications and experience. Medical insurance upon confirmation. How to Apply: Email your CV along with the names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com . Please specify the position you are applying for in the subject line of the email. text_full: Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49 th year of operations. DMS represents the world’s leading IT brands and specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets. DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, financial solutions and learning from the most experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry. DMS represents Diebold Nixdorf Inc. USA, the world leader in CRMs (Cash Recycling Machines) and ATMs (Automated Teller Machines) and while having implemented the following pioneering Projects, DMS is the market leader supporting an installed base of over 2000 CRMs and ATMs in Sri Lanka and the Maldives. Introduced ATMs to the Maldives in 1999 First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific. First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific. First Envelope-less Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific. First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins. Career advancement is based on performance and merit. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Rathnapura and Balangoda areas to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Rathnapura and Balangoda areas should apply. Engineering Service Executives for Rathnapura and Balangoda areas (Male) Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training. Candidates should: - Be under 27 years of age. Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution. Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software. Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Rathnapura and Balangoda areas. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply. Candidates should reside in the Rathnapura or Balangoda Town or in close proximity and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license. Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond. GENERAL • The above position includes a negotiable salary. Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to careers@dmslanka2.com . Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail. * First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives © First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific. © First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific. © First Envelope-tess Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific. © First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins. Career advancement is based on performance and merit. The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Rathnapura and Balangoda areas to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area and only candidates residing in Rathnapura and Balangoda areas should apply. Engineering Service Executives for Rathnapura and Balangoda areas (Male) Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training. Candidates should: - 1. Be under 27 years of age. 2. Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution. 3. Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software. Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Rathnapura and Balangoda areas. Only those who wish to pursue a career in self-service banking devices should apply. Candidates should reside in the Rathnapura or Balangoda Town or in close proximity and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license. ‘Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond. GENERAL + The above position includes a negotiable salary. Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to careers(@dmslanka?.com, Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail.

text_full: Ce Partnerships for Perfection Printcare PLC is an icon of Sri Lanka's Printing & Packaging industry, and is one of South Asia's best known Printing and Packaging enterprises with a clientele that extends over five continents. We are equipped with state-of-the-art technology and provide design-to-delivery printing, packaging & digital media solutions, across a broad spectrum of industries, including Apparel, Education, FMCG, Tea, Telecommunications, Publishing, Security Printing, Lottery, Print and Digital Media among others. Printcare Premedia Services Ltd. is a subsidiary of Printcare PLC, based in Kelaniya. As the Group's clientele as well as the manufacturing capacity and product range continues to expand geographically and exponentially with innovative products and new production sites, we are looking to strengthen our team with high caliber professionals Lead - Software Engineering Are you passionate about building scalable systems, mentoring engineers, and driving technical excellence? We're looking for a strategic, hands-on leader to guide our engineering team and shape our technical vision. What You'll Do: e Architect and implement high-quality, scalable software solutions. « Mentor developers and define engineering standards. * Collaborate on system design and product roadmaps. You Are: « A technical expert with deep knowledge of modern stacks. ¢ Comfortable traversing between hands-on coding and team leadership. « Up-to-date with emerging technologies and architectural patterns. Please email your curriculum vitae together with names and contact details of two non-related referees to careers@printcare.|Ik within 7 days. Please mention the position in the subject line. General Manager - Human Resources Printcare Premedia Services Ltd. No.77, Nungamugoda Road, Kelaniya £-mail: careers@printcare.|k Web: www. printcare.Ik “ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, ISO 45001:2018, FSSC 22000, FSC & BRC GS Accredited Company”
